name: Agent Session Handoff & Continuity Pattern
description: Durable handoff pattern for multi-agent coding work: continuity log (AGENT_CONTINUITY.md) tracks every session with ID, date, agent, changes, test results, and follow-ups. Includes session structure (AGENT-YYYYMMDD-###), current-focus table, session detail blocks, and integration with changelog.
author: Tiranyx
